title: Edge Case - Verify app state when backgrounded on Login screen
description: Tests that the entered data is preserved when the app is sent to the background and then resumed.
preconditions: User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Enter a 10-digit phone number in the input field.
2. Press the home button to send the app to the background.
3. Re-open the STAGE app from the recent apps list.
4. Observe the phone number input field.

expected_result: The app returns to the Login screen, and the previously entered phone number is still present in the input field.
